chooseResponse.q: What did you think of the movie?
options: I want to see it again.

conversation.transcript:
Student: Hey, did you catch that new film last night?
Advisor: Yes, I did! What did you think of it?
Student: I thought it was amazing! The visuals were stunning.
Advisor: I agree. The cinematography was truly impressive.

questions.q: What did the student think of the film?
questions.explain: 學生認為這部電影很棒。

questions.q: What impressed the advisor about the film?
questions.explain: 顧問對電影的攝影技術印象深刻。

announcement.transcript: Attention students! The university is hosting a career fair this Friday in the Student Center from 10 AM to 3 PM. This is a great opportunity to meet potential employers and learn about various job openings. Don't forget to bring your resumes and dress professionally!

questions.q: When is the career fair being held?
questions.explain: 職業博覽會將於本週五舉行。

questions.q: Where will the career fair take place?
questions.explain: 職業博覽會將在學生中心舉行。

talk.transcript: Today, I want to discuss the concept of sustainability. Sustainability refers to the ability to meet our present needs without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs. This encompasses various aspects, including environmental, social, and economic dimensions. For example, using renewable resources, reducing waste, and promoting social equity are all vital components of sustainability. By adopting sustainable practices, we can help ensure a healthy planet for years to come, benefiting both current and future communities.

questions.explain: 可持續性是指為未來保持健康的地球。

questions.q: What is one example of a sustainable practice?
questions.explain: 種樹是可持續做法的一個例子。
可持續性對確保健康的地球至關重要。

questions.q: Which aspect is NOT part of sustainability?
questions.explain: 有限資源並不是可持續性的組成部分。
